content.description_html: Perturbations ranked by effect size for each morphological feature. Pick a feature to see which compounds affect it most strongly. Ranked by |t-statistic| descending, filtered to p < 0.05 (BH-corrected). JUMP Hub for more information.
content.title: COMPOUND Perturbation Ranking by Feature

columns.Compartment: Mask used to calculate the feature: Nuclei, Cytoplasm, or Cells (union of both).
columns.JCP2022: JUMP reagent identifier, unique per compound.
columns.Effect size (t): T-statistic from plate-matched t-test (treatment vs. negative control). Positive = treatment > control. Larger absolute value = stronger effect.
columns.Feature significance: BH-corrected p-value for the compound-feature pair. Lower = more significant.
columns.Perturbation Rank: Rank of this compound among all compounds for this feature, ordered by |t-statistic| descending (1 = strongest effect).
